The spacious primary suite features a king-size bed, TV, walk-in closet, and en-suite bath with dual vanities. A comfortable guest suite with queen bed and adjacent bath is perfect for couples or friends. Just steps away, enjoy one of Florida’s largest resort-style pools, tennis courts, and a vibrant clubhouse — all within a beautifully landscaped tropical community. Gulf beaches, upscale dining, and shopping are only minutes away. Beach chairs, umbrellas, and towels are provided for your convenience. https://www.fallingwatersdavis.com/ Golfers’ bonus: From May 1 through October 31, enjoy exclusive green fees at The Glades Golf Course with the South Florida PGA GolfPass . Year-round tee time deals are also available via GolfNow . Your Southwest Florida retreat awaits — sunsets, palms, and effortless resort living. 🌴✨

properties.title: Whitten Drive House, Villas of Whittenberg (3 BR / 2 BA)
properties.description: Private Pool & Luxury in Naples Relax in your own private, heated pool at this stylish single-family home in the exclusive Villas of Whittenberg , just minutes from Downtown Naples. The southwest-facing lanai is perfect for soaking up the sun, grilling, or unwinding on the elegant pool deck. This three-bedroom, two-bath home features an open living area with high ceilings and a modern, fully equipped kitchen. The master suite has a king-size bed and en suite bath, the first guest bedroom a queen, and the third bedroom includes a desk and queen pull-out futon. Additional amenities include a garage, extra driveway space, beach gear, and washer/dryer. Located in prime East Naples , you’re minutes from pristine beaches, top dining, and upscale shopping, with community perks including a clubhouse, heated pools, and tennis courts. properties.title: WOODLANDS Condo, World Tennis Club (2 BR / 2 BA) – #C373
properties.description: Tropical Retreat in Naples – Woodlands at World Tennis Club Welcome to the Woodlands neighborhood in the gated, resort-style World Tennis Club! This west-facing condo in central Naples, Florida, offers access to 16 tennis courts, a heated community pool, clubhouse, hot tubs, and more. The screened balcony lanai overlooks a peaceful preserve – the perfect spot to enjoy stunning Southwest Florida sunsets. The master suite features a king-size bed, flat-screen TV, and en suite bathroom, while the guest bedroom has two twin beds and an adjacent bath. Cook in the modern kitchen or relax in the open-concept living area with stylish coastal furnishings. Just minutes from North Naples and Downtown Naples, you’re close to pristine beaches, top dining, and upscale shopping. Community amenities include a clubhouse, heated pools, and tennis courts. Golf Perks: From May 1–Oct 31, enjoy special rates at The Glades Golf Course with the South Florida PGA GolfPass, plus discounted green fees at other private courses through GolfNow. Your family-friendly Naples getaway is ready – sun, tennis, pool, and relaxation await!

properties.title: Beautiful 2 bed-/ 2 bathroom condo with lakeview
properties.description: Welcome to your dream retreat in Falling Waters, a premier residential community nestled in the heart of Naples, Florida. This stunning modern lakeview condo offers an exquisite blend of luxury, comfort, and the breathtaking natural beauty that Southwest Florida is renowned for. As you step into this beautifully designed condo, you are greeted by an open-concept layout that maximizes space and light. The expansive living area features large windows that frame picturesque views of the serene lake and lush landscaping. The modern aesthetic is enhanced by sleek finishes, neutral tones, and tasteful decor, creating an inviting atmosphere. The modern kitchen is a chef’s delight, equipped with stainless steel appliances, elegant quartz countertops, and ample cabinetry. Retreat to the luxurious master suite, where you will find a tranquil oasis complete with a spacious walk-in closet and a private en-suite bathroom featuring dual vanities and a separate walk-in shower. The additional bedroom is generously sized, providing comfort and privacy for guests or family members. Step outside onto your private screened lanai, where you can enjoy morning coffee or sunset cocktails while overlooking the tranquil waters. This outdoor space is perfect for relaxation and entertaining, surrounded by the sounds of nature and the beauty of the Florida landscape. Falling Waters offers an array of resort-style amenities, including a heated saltwater pool, tennis courts, and beautifully landscaped walking paths. The community is conveniently located close to Naples’ pristine beaches, fine dining, shopping, and cultural attractions, ensuring that you are never far from the vibrant lifestyle that Naples has to offer.
